title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library that wraps the Ollama REST API, letting you chat, generate embeddings, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, exposing the same chat, generate, and model APIs as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that adds Ollama as a first-class LLM provider inside LangChain, enabling local model chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that plugs into the local Ollama server and offers a ChatGPT-like experience with model switching, code highlighting, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with conversation history, prompt templates, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline code completion and chat.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library published to Maven Central for integrating Ollama models into JVM applications with async and streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem that mirrors the Python/JS clients, giving Rubyists idiomatic access to chat, generate, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production-ready retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) and compose examples for running Ollama server and WebUI in containers with one command.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node affinity and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated collection of recipes showing how to integrate Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, GPU stacks, and edge devices.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal React chatbot example that streams responses from a local Ollama server using the ollama-js package.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model and supports slash commands and conversation threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that listens for mentions and replies with streamed output from a configurable Ollama model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM capabilities to your notes via Ollama for summarization, Q&A, and text generation.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: Official n8n node that lets you add Ollama-powered LLM steps to no-code workflows for automation and data processing.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM-based testing and code review.

title: ollama-rag
summary: End-to-end retrieval-augmented-generation template combining Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain to chat with your documents offline.
